Event - Class in calendar.event
Represents a calendar event with a subject, start date & time, and optional details like end date & time, description, location and status.
Event.EventBuilder - Class in calendar.event
Builder class for constructing an Event object.
EventBuilder(String, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class calendar.event.Event.EventBuilder
Constructs a new EventBuilder with given information.
EventContext - Class in calendar.event
Parameter object for operating events, e.g.
EventContext(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class calendar.event.EventContext
Constructor for class EventContext.
EventInterface - Interface in calendar.event
This interface contains necessary operations that an event should support.
EventKey - Class in calendar.model
EventKey (subject + start + end) serves as the primal key of an event in calendar.
EventKey(String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class calendar.model.EventKey
Constructor for EventKey.
EventSeries - Class in calendar.event
This class represents a series of recurring calendar events, and generates the individual event keys based on weekdays, occurrences/end date.
EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder - Class in calendar.event
Builder class for creating and reset instances.

Constructs a new builder with mandatory parameters.
